calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Petitioner:Elizabeth Steblay, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Kate Janet Scheyer, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Dennis Scheyer.
No objections to the proposed change of name of a minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Kate Janet Steblay Scheyer.
Decree signed in open court.
